task.title: How to Import, Arrange, and Trim Video Clips
task.shortdesc: Learn how to import video clips into CapCut, organize them in the timeline, and trim unwanted footage. Completing this task will help you create a smoother and more organized video.

taskbody.prereq: Before starting this task, complete How to Download CapCut and Create a New Project and make sure a project is open in CapCut.
taskbody.context: Organizing clips is one of the first steps in creating a polished video. Arranging clips in a logical order and trimming unnecessary footage can improve pacing and make videos easier for viewers to follow.

step.cmd: Tap Add Clip if you want to import additional videos or photos.
step.info: Users can import multiple videos and images into the same project.
step.stepresult: The photo and video library opens.

step.cmd: Select the clips or photos you want to include in your video.
step.info: Choose clips in the order you want them to appear whenever possible.

step.cmd: Tap Add to place the selected clips into the timeline.
step.stepresult: The clips appear in the editing timeline.

step.cmd: Press and drag a clip to rearrange its position in the timeline.
step.info: The order of clips determines the sequence viewers will see in the final video.
step.stepresult: The clip moves to a new location in the timeline.

step.cmd: Tap a clip to select it.
step.stepresult: Editing options appear in the toolbar.

step.cmd: Drag the edges of a selected clip inward to trim unwanted footage.
step.info: Trimming shortens a clip by removing unnecessary sections at the beginning or end.
step.stepresult: The clip becomes shorter in the timeline.

step.cmd: Tap Play to preview the arrangement of your clips.
step.info: Previewing helps identify clips that need to be rearranged or trimmed further.
step.stepresult: The edited sequence plays in the preview window.

taskbody.result: You have successfully imported, organized, and trimmed video clips in CapCut. Your project is now prepared for adding text, captions, music, or transitions.
taskbody.postreq: Continue to How to Add Text and Captions to a Video or How to Add Music, Audio, and Sound Effects.
